summary: George Russell outmaneuvered Max Verstappen down the final laps to secure Mercedes' Austrian victory, building on a pole position he snatched through quick thinking during a chaotic qualifying session. The Mercedes driver absorbed intense pressure from the Red Bull challenger throughout the race, demonstrating the maturity required to hold his nerve when the championship fight demanded it most. Russell's second win of 2026 moves him closer to the championship lead and builds significant momentum as he heads into his home race at Silverstone.
